# Create .mta files with different genres (2025-12-02 18:18Z)

_**User (2025-12-02 18:18Z)**_

see how these .mta files are made. well i need you to make more the same just wuth different genre infront of the 1=

@G - Black Metal.mta (1-4) 



example if we were adding Folk genre it would be

[#0]

T=5

F=GENRE

1=Folk

---



---


Created 60 new genre .mta files using the same structure. Each file follows the pattern:

```
[#0]
T=5
F=GENRE
1={Genre Name}
```

For filenames with slashes (like "Black/Death" and "Death/Doom"), I used underscores in the filename (e.g., `G - Black_Death.mta`) since slashes aren't allowed in macOS filenames, but the content inside uses the slash as specified (e.g., `1=Black/Death`).

All files are ready to use in mp3tag. The existing files (Black Metal, Death Metal, Thrash Metal, etc.) were left unchanged.

---
